nasb.text: And I was afraid, and went away and hid your talent in the ground. See, you have what is yours.’

esv.text: so I was afraid, and I went and hid your talent in the ground. Here, you have what is yours.’

cnv.text: 所以，我就害怕起來，去把你的錢藏在地裡。你看，你的錢還在這裡。’

ccb.text: 我很害怕，就去把你的钱藏在地里。请看，这是你的钱。’

csbs.text: 我惧怕，就去把你的银子藏在地里。请看，你的银子在这里。’
